roadmap_text:
# Q3 Roadmap

- Improve conversion rate by simplifying checkout
- Minimize checkout changes this quarter due to payment migration risk
- Launch new cross-sell modules on PDP
- Reduce engineering support load by 20%
- Roll out one-page checkout to 100% of traffic in 2 weeks
prd_text:
# PRD: One-page checkout redesign

Goal: improve checkout completion and reduce friction
Scope: redesign shipping, payment, promo code, and address workflows
Dependencies: payment gateway migration in progress
Rollout: 100% rollout targeted in 2 weeks
Owner: Product
Success criteria: intuitive and seamless checkout
okr_text:
# Q3 OKRs

- Increase checkout conversion by 8%
- Reduce payment-related incidents by 30%
- Keep launch risk low during migration
- Reduce support tickets linked to checkout issues by 15%

roadmap_text: # Roadmap\n- Launch new search filters in 1 week\n- Freeze search changes this month due to instability
